fifteen_dishes.title: Cook 15 unique Farmer's Delight dishes — start building meal variety

subtitle.text: Sixty-four recipes. Every one of them fills a different gap.

description: CH.02 · THE CULTIVATED TABLE
▸ Farmer's Delight has 64+ unique recipes.
Each one touches a different food group.
Each one demands preparation.
Each one is worth cooking at least once.
◈ THE FULL KITCHEN
└ Cutting Board: knife prep — slices, cuts, mince
└ Skillet: fast cook on fire — bacon, eggs, steak
└ Cooking Pot: slow soups — chicken soup, stew
└ Stove (Farm & Charm): coal-powered, multi-slot
└ Smoke Rack: smoked meat — adds preservation flavor
◈ FOOD DESIRE SYSTEM
└ The more types of food you eat, the better your stats
└ FD is the primary engine for Diet coverage
└ Cultural Delights (Ch05) adds sushi, avocado, more
└ Youkai's Feasts (Ch05) adds 143+ dishes
◈ SCROLL: The Cultivated Table
└ Found in: village chef houses, cooking guild chests,
road inns, kitchen ruins
└ Research time: 20 min
└ Unlocks: full FD recipe awareness, Cultural Delights preview
▸ The scroll is a recipe compendium.
It doesn't teach you how to cook.
It shows you what has been cooked before.
▶ Find The Cultivated Table scroll [check]
▶ Cook 15 unique Farmer's Delight dishes [check]
◇ Cultural Delights (Ch05) adds sushi, tamales,
and avocado toast. The Cultivated Table scroll
mentions them by name.
